parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  "senderName": $('Email Trigger (IMAP)').item.json.from ? $('Email Trigger (IMAP)').item.json.from.value[0].name : "",
  "senderEmail": $('Email Trigger (IMAP)').item.json.from ? $('Email Trigger (IMAP)').item.json.from.value[0].address : "",
  "subject": $('Email Trigger (IMAP)').item.json.subject,
  "body": $('Email Trigger (IMAP)').item.json.text,
  "category": JSON.parse($json.choices[0].message.content).category,
  "priority": JSON.parse($json.choices[0].message.content).priority,
  "meetingDate": JSON.parse($json.choices[0].message.content).meetingDate,
  "meetingTime": JSON.parse($json.choices[0].message.content).meetingTime,
  "meetingTitle": JSON.parse($json.choices[0].message.content).meetingTitle
}) }}
